name: Toffee Apples/Bananas with Sesame B1
recipeIngredient: 6 Ripe but firm bananas, cut into 4 or 5 chunks
3 medium Firm apples, cored, peeled, and cut into 6 to 8 pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs and flour, blending into a smooth batter.
2. Dip apples and bananas into batter.
3. Heat oil until very hot.
4. Add fruit (six to eight pieces at a time).
5. Fry for 2 to 3 minutes, or until golden brown.
6. Drain on absorbent paper.
7. Continue the process until all the fruit is cooked.
8. Place sugar, water, and vegetable oil in a large saucepan over moderate heat.
9. Stir with a wooden spoon until the mixture has thickened and begins to turn golden brown.
10. Stir in the sesame seeds.
11. Add fruit pieces to coat, remove, and serve.
Temperature: HOT
Effort: AVERAGE
Time: 00:15
